# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Simple Auth (Hashed Passwords)
 * Description: Provides frontend user registration and login with secure password hashing and verification.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Example
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

final class Simple_Auth_Hashed_Passwords {
    const OPT_VERSION = 'sahp_version';

    public static function init() {
        add_shortcode('sahp_register', [__CLASS__, 'shortcode_register']);
        add_shortcode('sahp_login', [__CLASS__, 'shortcode_login']);
        add_action('init', [__CLASS__, 'handle_post_requests']);
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, [__CLASS__, 'on_activate']);
    }

    public static function on_activate() {
        update_option(self::OPT_VERSION, '1.0.0');
    }

    private static function sanitize_username($username) {
        $username = sanitize_user($username, true);
        return $username;
    }

    private static function sanitize_email_field($email) {
        return sanitize_email($email);
    }

    private static function verify_nonce($action, $field = '_wpnonce') {
        if (empty($_POST[$field]) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST[$field], $action)) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_nonce', 'Invalid request.');
        }
        return true;
    }

    private static function errors_to_html($errors) {
        if (is_wp_error($errors)) $errors = $errors->get_error_messages();
        if (empty($errors)) return '';
        $out = '<div class="sahp-errors" role="alert">';
        foreach ((array)$errors as $e) {
            $out .= '<p>' . esc_html($e) . '</p>';
        }
        $out .= '</div>';
        return $out;
    }

    public static function handle_post_requests() {
        if (!empty($_POST['sahp_action']) && is_string($_POST['sahp_action'])) {
            $action = sanitize_key($_POST['sahp_action']);
            if ($action === 'register') {
                self::process_register();
            } elseif ($action === 'login') {
                self::process_login();
            } elseif ($action === 'logout') {
                self::process_logout();
            }
        }
    }

    private static function process_register() {
        $nonce_check = self::verify_nonce('sahp_register', 'sahp_nonce');
        if (is_wp_error($nonce_check)) {
            self::store_flash('register', $nonce_check->get_error_messages());
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            self::store_flash('register', ['You are already logged in.']);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $username = isset($_POST['sahp_username']) ? self::sanitize_username(wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_username'])) : '';
        $email    = isset($_POST['sahp_email']) ? self::sanitize_email_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_email'])) : '';
        $pass1    = isset($_POST['sahp_password']) ? (string)wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_password']) : '';
        $pass2    = isset($_POST['sahp_password2']) ? (string)wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_password2']) : '';

        $errors = new WP_Error();

        if ($username === '') $errors->add('username_required', 'Username is required.');
        if ($email === '' || !is_email($email)) $errors->add('email_invalid', 'A valid email is required.');
        if ($pass1 === '') $errors->add('password_required', 'Password is required.');
        if ($pass1 !== $pass2) $errors->add('password_mismatch', 'Passwords do not match.');
        if (strlen($pass1) > 0 && strlen($pass1) < 8) $errors->add('password_weak', 'Password must be at least 8 characters.');

        if (username_exists($username)) $errors->add('username_exists', 'Username already exists.');
        if (email_exists($email)) $errors->add('email_exists', 'Email already exists.');

        if ($errors->has_errors()) {
            self::store_flash('register', $errors->get_error_messages());
            self::store_flash('register_fields', [
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
            ]);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $user_id = wp_insert_user([
            'user_login' => $username,
            'user_email' => $email,
            'user_pass'  => $pass1, // WordPress hashes securely
            'role'       => get_option('default_role', 'subscriber'),
        ]);

        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            self::store_flash('register', [$user_id->get_error_message()]);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        // Demonstrate hashing & verification (in addition to WP core hashing)
        // Store an additional app-specific hash (Argon2id if available, else bcrypt) for demonstration.
        $hash_algo = defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID') ? PASSWORD_ARGON2ID : PASSWORD_BCRYPT;
        $custom_hash = password_hash($pass1, $hash_algo);
        if ($custom_hash) {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_sahp_custom_hash', $custom_hash);
        }

        wp_set_current_user($user_id);
        wp_set_auth_cookie($user_id, true);

        self::store_flash('register_success', ['Registration successful. You are now logged in.']);
        self::safe_redirect_back();
    }

    private static function process_login() {
        $nonce_check = self::verify_nonce('sahp_login', 'sahp_nonce');
        if (is_wp_error($nonce_check)) {
            self::store_flash('login', $nonce_check->get_error_messages());
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            self::store_flash('login', ['You are already logged in.']);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $login = isset($_POST['sahp_login']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_login'])) : '';
        $pass  = isset($_POST['sahp_password']) ? (string)wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_password']) : '';

        $errors = new WP_Error();
        if ($login === '') $errors->add('login_required', 'Username or email is required.');
        if ($pass === '') $errors->add('password_required', 'Password is required.');

        if ($errors->has_errors()) {
            self::store_flash('login', $errors->get_error_messages());
            self::store_flash('login_fields', ['login' => $login]);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $user = get_user_by('login', $login);
        if (!$user && is_email($login)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $login);
        }

        if (!$user) {
            self::store_flash('login', ['Invalid credentials.']);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        // Verify password using WP core hashing
        $wp_ok = wp_check_password($pass, $user->user_pass, $user->ID);

        // Additionally verify against optional custom hash if present.
        $custom_hash = get_user_meta($user->ID, '_sahp_custom_hash', true);
        $custom_ok = true;
        if (is_string($custom_hash) && $custom_hash !== '') {
            $custom_ok = password_verify($pass, $custom_hash);
            if ($custom_ok && password_needs_rehash($custom_hash, (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID') ? PASSWORD_ARGON2ID : PASSWORD_BCRYPT))) {
                $rehash = password_hash($pass, (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID') ? PASSWORD_ARGON2ID : PASSWORD_BCRYPT));
                if ($rehash) update_user_meta($user->ID, '_sahp_custom_hash', $rehash);
            }
        }

        if (!$wp_ok || !$custom_ok) {
            self::store_flash('login', ['Invalid credentials.']);
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }

        wp_set_current_user($user->ID);
        wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID, true);

        self::store_flash('login_success', ['Login successful.']);
        self::safe_redirect_back();
    }

    private static function process_logout() {
        $nonce_check = self::verify_nonce('sahp_logout', 'sahp_nonce');
        if (is_wp_error($nonce_check)) {
            self::safe_redirect_back();
        }
        wp_logout();
        self::store_flash('logout_success', ['You have been logged out.']);
        self::safe_redirect_back();
    }

    private static function safe_redirect_back() {
        $redirect = '';
        if (!empty($_POST['sahp_redirect'])) {
            $redirect = esc_url_raw(wp_unslash($_POST['sahp_redirect']));
        }
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        }
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    private static function store_flash($key, $value) {
        if (!session_id()) {
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                @session_start();
            }
        }
        if (session_id()) {
            $_SESSION['sahp_flash'][$key] = $value;
            return;
        }
        set_transient('sahp_flash_' . $key . '_' . wp_get_session_token(), $value, MINUTE_IN_SECONDS * 5);
    }

    private static function get_flash($key, $default = null) {
        if (!session_id()) {
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                @session_start();
            }
        }
        if (session_id() && isset($_SESSION['sahp_flash'][$key])) {
            $v = $_SESSION['sahp_flash'][$key];
            unset($_SESSION['sahp_flash'][$key]);
            return $v;
        }
        $tkey = 'sahp_flash_' . $key . '_' . wp_get_session_token();
        $v = get_transient($tkey);
        if ($v !== false) {
            delete_transient($tkey);
            return $v;
        }
        return $default;
    }

    public static function shortcode_register($atts = []) {
        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'redirect' => '',
        ], $atts, 'sahp_register');

        $messages = (array) self::get_flash('register', []);
        $success  = (array) self::get_flash('register_success', []);
        $fields   = (array) self::get_flash('register_fields', []);

        $redirect = $atts['redirect'] ? esc_url($atts['redirect']) : '';

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            $u = wp_get_current_user();
            $logout_url = esc_url(add_query_arg([]));
            $out  = '';
            $out .= self::errors_to_html($success);
            $out .= '<div class="sahp-logged-in">';
            $out .= '<p>You are logged in as <strong>' . esc_html($u->user_login) . '</strong>.</p>';
            $out .= '<form method="post">';
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_action" value="logout">';
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_redirect" value="' . esc_attr($redirect ?: $logout_url) . '">';
            $out .= wp_nonce_field('sahp_logout', 'sahp_nonce', true, false);
            $out .= '<button type="submit">Log out</button>';
            $out .= '</form>';
            $out .= '</div>';
            return $out;
        }

        $out = '';
        $out .= self::errors_to_html($messages);
        $out .= self::errors_to_html($success);

        $out .= '<form method="post" class="sahp-form sahp-register">';
        $out .= '<p><label>Username<br><input type="text" name="sahp_username" value="' . esc_attr($fields['username'] ?? '') . '" autocomplete="username" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Email<br><input type="email" name="sahp_email" value="' . esc_attr($fields['email'] ?? '') . '" autocomplete="email" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Password<br><input type="password" name="sahp_password" autocomplete="new-password" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Confirm Password<br><input type="password" name="sahp_password2" autocomplete="new-password" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_action" value="register">';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_redirect" value="' . esc_attr($redirect) . '">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field('sahp_register', 'sahp_nonce', true, false);
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Register</button></p>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        return $out;
    }

    public static function shortcode_login($atts = []) {
        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'redirect' => '',
        ], $atts, 'sahp_login');

        $messages = (array) self::get_flash('login', []);
        $success  = (array) self::get_flash('login_success', []);
        $logout_success = (array) self::get_flash('logout_success', []);
        $fields   = (array) self::get_flash('login_fields', []);

        $redirect = $atts['redirect'] ? esc_url($atts['redirect']) : '';

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            $u = wp_get_current_user();
            $logout_url = esc_url(add_query_arg([]));
            $out  = '';
            $out .= self::errors_to_html($success);
            $out .= self::errors_to_html($logout_success);
            $out .= '<div class="sahp-logged-in">';
            $out .= '<p>You are logged in as <strong>' . esc_html($u->user_login) . '</strong>.</p>';
            $out .= '<form method="post">';
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_action" value="logout">';
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_redirect" value="' . esc_attr($redirect ?: $logout_url) . '">';
            $out .= wp_nonce_field('sahp_logout', 'sahp_nonce', true, false);
            $out .= '<button type="submit">Log out</button>';
            $out .= '</form>';
            $out .= '</div>';
            return $out;
        }

        $out = '';
        $out .= self::errors_to_html($messages);
        $out .= self::errors_to_html($success);
        $out .= self::errors_to_html($logout_success);

        $out .= '<form method="post" class="sahp-form sahp-login">';
        $out .= '<p><label>Username or Email<br><input type="text" name="sahp_login" value="' . esc_attr($fields['login'] ?? '') . '" autocomplete="username" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Password<br><input type="password" name="sahp_password" autocomplete="current-password" required></label></p>';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_action" value="login">';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sahp_redirect" value="' . esc_attr($redirect) . '">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field('sahp_login', 'sahp_nonce', true, false);
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Log in</button></p>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        return $out;
    }
}

Simple_Auth_Hashed_Passwords::init();
